key_metrics: Operating profit: $524.6 million (down 41.1% YoY from $891.4 million)
Gross profit: $1,366.9 million, representing a 30.8% gross margin
qoq_changes: Net sales for the quarter decreased by $405.5 million year-over-year
Operating profit declined by $366.8 million year-over-year
Divestiture impacts swung unfavorably from a $95.9 million gain in the prior year quarter to a $5.0 million loss
new_risks: Significant year-over-year contraction in top-line revenue and operating margins
Potential demand or pricing headwinds indicated by the 8.4% sales drop (qualitative MD&A not provided in excerpt)
management_tone: Cautious; the financial statements reflect significant top-line and bottom-line contraction, with net earnings halving year-over-year.
analyst_note: General Mills experienced a difficult Q3 2026, marked by an 8.4% decline in net sales and a 51.6% drop in net income. The absence of prior-year divestiture gains and substantially lower operating profits highlight ongoing profitability and growth challenges that warrant close monitoring.
